title: FDA Approves Celcuity's Revtorpyk for HR+/HER2- Breast Cancer
headline: FDA approves Celcuity's Revtorpyk (gedatolisib) for HR+/HER2-, PIK3CA wild-type advanced or metastatic breast cancer, with HR 0.24 and 76% risk reduction in VIKTORIA-1 trial.
key_facts: FDA approval July 14, 2026; VIKTORIA-1 HR 0.24, median PFS 9.3 vs 2.0 months (76% risk reduction); Celcuity stock $103.79→$111.05; $10B commercial potential; regimen: gedatolisib + fulvestrant ± palbociclib

title: AstraZeneca Licenses Dizal's Zegfrovy for Up to $1.5B
headline: AstraZeneca acquires exclusive global rights to Dizal's oral EGFR inhibitor Zegfrovy (sunvozertinib) for $600M upfront plus up to $900M in milestones.
key_facts: $600M upfront; up to $900M development/regulatory/sales milestones; total up to $1.5B; tiered royalties on global sales; deal close expected H2 2026; drug: sunvozertinib, oral EGFR inhibitor for lung cancer

title: Biogen CELIA Data: Diranersen Slows Cognitive Decline but Misses Primary
headline: Biogen's Phase 2 CELIA trial shows diranersen achieved 26% slowing on CDR-SB and 50-65% CSF tau reduction at 60mg over 18 months in 416 patients, but missed primary dose-response endpoint.
key_facts: Phase 2 CELIA, 416 patients, 18-month RCT; 26% CDR-SB slowing at 60mg; 50-65% CSF total tau reduction; missed primary endpoint (inverse dose-response); presented AAIC 2026 London July 12-15

title: Huyabio HBI-8000 Scores Phase 3 Win in Melanoma
headline: Huyabio's HDAC inhibitor HBI-8000 meets positive Phase 3 endpoint in checkpoint-naïve unresectable/metastatic melanoma when combined with immune checkpoint inhibitors.
key_facts: HBI-8000-303 global Phase 3 pivotal trial; indication: unresectable/metastatic melanoma, checkpoint-naïve; combined with ICIs; prior Phase 2: HBI-8000-302

title: NextCure/Avere Merge on Oral IL-23 Psoriasis Therapy
headline: NextCure and Avere Therapeutics merge to advance AVR-001, a once-weekly oral IL-23 inhibitor, with stock spiking ~3X on deal announcement.
key_facts: NextCure stock ~3X spike; lead asset AVR-001, once-weekly oral IL-23; runway funds Phase 2b psoriasis readout, Phase 3 psoriasis initiation, Phase 2b ulcerative colitis initiation

title: Leqembi Subcutaneous Starter Dose Approved by FDA
headline: FDA approves subcutaneous starter-dose formulation of lecanemab (Leqembi) for Alzheimer's disease.
key_facts: FDA approval for subcutaneous starter dose; drug: Leqembi (lecanemab); approval date July 13-14, 2026

title: Chai Discovery Raises $400M on AI Drug Discovery Platform
headline: AI-driven drug discovery platform Chai Discovery closes $400M financing round, tripling valuation from seven months prior.
key_facts: $400M raised; valuation tripled in 7 months; AI drug-discovery platform

title: Roche Terminates Two Ionis Huntington's Antisense Programs
headline: Roche discontinues tominersen and a second Ionis antisense oligonucleotide program for Huntington's disease due to lack of disease-progression delay and animal safety signals.
key_facts: Drug tominersen failed to delay Huntington's disease progression; second drug halted due to safety signal in animal testing

title: Pfizer Downgraded on Delayed 2027 Growth Catalysts
headline: Analyst downgrades Pfizer on beta-raise concerns; growth catalysts atirmociclib, SV, VEGF-bispecific pushed to 2027.
key_facts: Pfizer beta raised 0.85 from 0.78; key catalysts: atirmociclib, SV, VEGF-bispecific; timeline pushed to 2027

title: Evotec Plummets 32% on Widened H1 Loss, Slashed Outlook
headline: Evotec stock drops 32% after H1 2026 loss widened and full-year guidance slashed.
key_facts: Stock decline −32%; H1 loss widened; full-year outlook reduced

title: Erasca Launches $550M Public Offering; Summit Divests Antibiotic
headline: Erasca announces $550M equity offering; Summit Therapeutics sells antibiotic asset.
